name: Bleak
short_description: Dissatisfaction and frustration are common feelings in life. You face a path where every choice can bring you closer to or further from the improvement you so desire. Difficult decisions require strong wills.
detailed_description:
Bleak is an innovative 2D adventure developed with RPG Maker that blends the nostalgic aesthetics of games like Omori, OneShot, and To the Moon with a revolution in gameplay.

You embody Oshibka, a man who is dissatisfied and frustrated with his life, who quits his job in search of a change. Unintentionally, he plunges into a world of crime, facing a turbulent journey filled with crucial decisions. Every choice you make will impact his struggle to escape this dangerous environment and find personal redemption.

It introduces a real-time battle system (ABS) that breaks away from the tradition of turn-based combat. Your skill and reflexes will be crucial for surviving the confrontations that await you. Additionally, the experience is enriched with mechanics inspired by Shakedown: Hawaii, Resident Evil, and the early GTA games.
